title: AI Use Case Evaluation Portal
tagline: A governance portal for prioritizing AI use cases with security, privacy, ethics, value, and feasibility evidence.

book.title: Artificial Intelligence for Security Culture Transformation
book.author: Musaab Hasan
book.theme: AI use case evaluation, data readiness, ethical controls, security value, and implementation feasibility.

dimensions.label: Strategic Alignment
dimensions.description: Measures fit with security culture and business outcomes.

dimensions.label: Value Potential
dimensions.description: Assesses expected risk reduction, learning improvement, or efficiency gain.

dimensions.label: Data Readiness
dimensions.description: Measures quality, availability, minimization, and governance of required data.

dimensions.label: Implementation Feasibility
dimensions.description: Assesses technical, operational, and integration feasibility.

dimensions.label: Privacy and Ethics
dimensions.description: Tracks fairness, transparency, consent, explainability, and oversight.

dimensions.label: Operational Resilience
dimensions.description: Measures monitoring, fallback, accountability, and support readiness.

workflows: Register a proposed AI use case with owner, purpose, data needs, and expected value.
Score the use case across strategic, technical, ethical, and operational dimensions.
Route high-value and high-risk use cases for deeper governance review.
Track approved pilots through evidence, controls, and post-implementation outcomes.
evidence_examples: Assessment score movement with dated evidence.
Documented behavior observations from simulations or operational workflows.
Leadership review notes, action owners, and completed improvement tasks.
